verses.1: “My spirit is broken, my days are extinguished, The grave is ready for me.
verses.2: “Mockers are certainly with me, And my eye gazes on their provocation.
verses.3: “Make a pledge for me with Yourself; Who is there that will be my guarantor?
verses.4: “For You have kept their hearts away from understanding; Therefore You will not exalt them.
verses.5: “He who informs against friends for a share of the spoils, The eyes of his children also will perish.
verses.6: “But He has made me a proverb among the people, And I am one at whom people spit.
verses.7: “My eye has also become inexpressive because of grief, And all my body parts are like a shadow.
verses.8: “The upright will be appalled at this, And the innocent will stir himself up against the godless.
verses.9: “Nevertheless the righteous will hold to his way, And the one who has clean hands will grow stronger and stronger.
verses.10: “But come again all of you now, For I do not find a wise man among you.
verses.11: “My days are past, my plans are torn apart, The wishes of my heart.
verses.12: “They make night into day, saying, ‘The light is near,’ in the presence of darkness.
verses.13: “If I hope for Sheol as my home, I make my bed in the darkness;
verses.14: If I call to the grave, ‘You are my father’; To the maggot, ‘my mother and my sister’;
verses.15: Where then is my hope? And who looks at my hope?
verses.16: “Will it go down with me to Sheol? Shall we together go down into the dust?”
